content: We can frame Self-Refine as a single-perspective iterative refinement backbone that can be augmented with the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework. This hybrid approach retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no extra supervised training or reinforcement learning, while resolving the common flaw of single-perspective self-feedback where a model repeats its own blind spots across iterations.
